name: String of gear item's name
description: String of short description of item
effect: String of mechanical effect of item
cost: Positive INT of req cost of item
slots: Positive INT of how many inventory slots the item takes up
special: String of additional special properties or restrictions of item
stack: positive INT of how many copies stack per inventory slot
isMinor: Boolean of whether item has Minor keyword and takes up no slots
hasclock: Boolean of whether item has a time duration
clockValue: Number of segments before the item's clock runs out
